Operation 'listCompanies' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The current description is too minimal. An AI agent needs to understand what parameters are available, how pagination works, and what data structure to expect in the response.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of companies.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all companies in the system. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns a CompanyListResponse object containing an array of Company objects with pagination metadata (total count, page number, page size).
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks details about pagination parameters, filtering/sorting capabilities, and the structure of the response. An AI agent needs to understand what parameters are available, how pagination works, and what data structure to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'upsertCompany' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making: it doesn't specify what fields are required in the request, whether partial updates are supported, what the response contains, or the HTTP status code. Added clarity on request schema requirements, update behavior, response structure, and status code to improve AI interpretability.

data.current_description: Upsert a company by internal_id. If a company with the given internal_id exists, it will be updated.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new company or updates an existing one using the internal_id as the unique identifier. If a company with the provided internal_id exists, all provided fields will be updated; otherwise, a new company record is created. Requires UpsertCompanyRequest with internal_id and company details. Returns HTTP 201 with the created or updated Company object.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making: it doesn't specify what fields are required in the request, whether partial updates are supported, what the response contains, or the HTTP status code. Added clarity on request schema requirements, update behavior, response structure, and status code to improve AI interpretability.

message: Operation 'createFeedback' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects of creation. Added information about the return value (created feedback object with ID) and that the entry becomes immediately available, which helps AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

data.current_description: Create a new feedback entry. Optionally link to a person, company, or feature request.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new feedback entry to track customer input. Optionally link the feedback to a contact (person), company, or feature request for organization and tracking. Returns the created feedback object with its assigned ID. The feedback entry is immediately available for retrieval and analysis.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects of creation. Added information about the return value (created feedback object with ID) and that the entry becomes immediately available, which helps AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'listFeedback' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. The current description is too generic about filtering and sorting options. Enhanced with specific filter types (contact, company, feature request, status) and clarified pagination behavior and return structure to help AI agents understand available query options and response format.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of feedback entries with optional filtering and sorting.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of feedback entries. Supports filtering by contact, company, feature request, or status, and sorting by date or priority. data.reasoning: The current description is too generic about filtering and sorting options. Enhanced with specific filter types (contact, company, feature request, status) and clarified pagination behavior and return structure to help AI agents understand available query options and response format.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of feature requests with optional filtering and sorting.

Use pagination parameters to navigate results. Returns a list of feature request objects with metadata including total count and page information.
data.reasoning: Similar to listFeedback, the description lacks specificity about available filters and sorting options. Added concrete filter types (status, priority, contact, company) and sort options to enable AI agents to construct appropriate queries and understand the response structure.

message: Operation 'listContacts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. The description is too minimal and doesn't clarify what information is returned or available filtering options. Enhanced to explain that contacts represent people/users, clarified pagination support, and specified the types of contact information returned to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts (users/people). Supports pagination to navigate through results. Returns a list of contact objects with their associated information including name, email, company affiliation, and metadata including total count and page information.
data.reasoning: The description is too minimal and doesn't clarify what information is returned or available filtering options. Enhanced to explain that contacts represent people/users, clarified pagination support, and specified the types of contact information returned to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'upsertContact' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description explains the upsert logic but lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects. Added information about the return value (contact object), clarified that this enables external system synchronization, and specified that provided fields are updated (supporting partial updates), which helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and impact.

data.current_description: Upsert a contact by internal_id. If a contact with the given internal_id exists, it will be updated.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new contact or update an existing one using internal_id as the unique identifier. If a contact with the provided internal_id exists, all provided fields will be updated; otherwise, a new contact is created. Returns the created or updated contact object. This operation enables synchronization of contact data from external systems.
data.reasoning: The current description explains the upsert logic but lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects. Added information about the return value (contact object), clarified that this enables external system synchronization, and specified that provided fields are updated (supporting partial updates), which helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and impact.

Added concrete filter types (status, priority, contact, company) and sort options to enable AI agents to construct appropriate queries and understand the response structure.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of feature requests with optional filtering and sorting.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of feature requests. Supports filtering by status, priority, contact, or company, and sorting by date, priority, or request count. Use pagination parameters to navigate results. Returns a list of feature request objects with metadata including total count and page information.
data.reasoning: Similar to listFeedback, the description lacks specificity about available filters and sorting options. Added concrete filter types (status, priority, contact, company) and sort options to enable AI agents to construct appropriate queries and understand the response structure.

message: Operation 'listContacts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. The description is too minimal and doesn't clarify what information is returned or available filtering options. Enhanced to explain that contacts represent people/users, clarified pagination support, and specified the types of contact information returned to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts (users/people). Supports pagination to navigate through results. Returns a list of contact objects with their associated information including name, email, company affiliation, and metadata including total count and page information.
data.reasoning: The description is too minimal and doesn't clarify what information is returned or available filtering options. Enhanced to explain that contacts represent people/users, clarified pagination support, and specified the types of contact information returned to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'upsertContact' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description explains the upsert logic but lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects. Added information about the return value (contact object), clarified that this enables external system synchronization, and specified that provided fields are updated (supporting partial updates), which helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and impact.

data.current_description: Upsert a contact by internal_id. If a contact with the given internal_id exists, it will be updated.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new contact or update an existing one using internal_id as the unique identifier. If a contact with the provided internal_id exists, all provided fields will be updated; otherwise, a new contact is created. Returns the created or updated contact object. This operation enables synchronization of contact data from external systems.
data.reasoning: The current description explains the upsert logic but lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects. Added information about the return value (contact object), clarified that this enables external system synchronization, and specified that provided fields are updated (supporting partial updates), which helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and impact.
